title: Reserved example domains
question: What does RFC 2606 establish about example.com?

proposals.canonicalText: IANA reserves example.com for use as an example.
proposals.subject: IANA
proposals.predicate: reserves for use as an example
proposals.supportingQuote:
The Internet Assigned Numbers Authority (IANA) also currently has the
following second level domain names reserved which can be used as examples.

example.com

proposals.canonicalText: IANA guarantees that example.com remains reachable over HTTPS.
proposals.subject: IANA
proposals.supportingQuote: No exact source passage supports this proposed claim.
